Hero.title: Svitanok Creative Workshop
Hero.subtitle: Not just a workshop, but a whole world where voice is art, and quality service is the foundation. A small creative family where talents grow.

About.title: More than just a
About.description1: "Svitanok" is a space created with love for details and boundless respect for art. We believe that every voice should sound special, so we have created the perfect conditions for your true potential to unfold.
About.description2: Our team is a small creative family. We combine a professional approach, modern techniques, and an incredibly warm atmosphere so that every lesson inspires you to new achievements and brings joy.

Directions.title: Choose your
Directions.item1Desc: Individual lessons for all ages. Discover your unique timbre, master breathing, and learn professional vocal techniques in a comfortable atmosphere.
Directions.item2Desc: Engaging group classes for toddlers. Through play, we introduce children to the world of music, developing their sense of rhythm, hearing, and coordination.
Directions.item3Desc: Singing in harmony and developing teamwork skills. A great opportunity to make friends and create a unique shared sound.
Directions.item4Desc: Professional speech diagnostics and correction. We help overcome pronunciation defects, expand vocabulary, and develop expressive articulation.
Directions.item5Desc: A space for free self-expression. We teach the basics of painting, composition, and help everyone find their own visual style.
Directions.item6Desc: A comprehensive program for future first-graders. Reading, writing, basic math, and soft psychological adaptation to the learning process.
Directions.item7Desc: Support for students in grades 1-4 (individual and group). Help with homework, deepening knowledge, and developing logical thinking.
Directions.item8Desc: Piano and guitar lessons. From your first chords to confidently playing your favorite melodies with an understanding of music theory.
Directions.item9Desc: Unleashing charisma, releasing physical tension, and mastering stage speech. Learn to improvise and confidently hold an audience.

Contacts.title: Let's
Contacts.location1Address: Rivne, Soborna St, 112 (near the Drama Theater)
Contacts.location2Address: Zoria (Rivne district), Zhovtneva Sq, 1 (Palace of Culture)
